violations.text: The kitchen ceiling has an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, metal bowl on clean storage shelf) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items are to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The door to the outside, located in the hallway between kitchen and emergency food storage room, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
Water observed in the mixer bowl. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. Establishment is lacking an air drying rack. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
Plastic food containers observed not in good repair, cracked with pieces missing. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Aluminum wrap observed lining utensil drawer. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: can opener base table beneath slicer shelves above prep tables and grill, including the undersides dishwasher table floor refrigerators and freezers utensil drawer. Some kitchen shelves have an accumulation of adhesive residue. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
Handwashing sinks in the kitchen were dirty. PLUMBING FIXTURES such as HANDWASHING SINKS shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
The fan covers in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of dust and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The hood light covers an accumulation of soil residue and debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The floors beneath storage shelves, and walls in the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

The kitchen window and ceiling have an accumulation of soil residue, debris, and cobwebs especially above the ice machine/slicer/mixer area. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025

Employees' clothing or other personal belongings were observed stored in the dry storage area. Lockers or other suitable facilities shall be used for the orderly storage of employees' clothing and other possessions. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and/or biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Empty chlorine container was replaced. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Milk was observed held at 51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

Water observed in the robot coupe, and stacked plastic food containers. After cleaning and sanitizing, equipment and utensils must be air dried. An air drying rack for the dishwashing area is recommended. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024

The refrigerator located in the Daisy unit area was not in good repair, not holding food at 41 degrees or below. No food requiring refrigeration is to be stored in that refrigerator until it is repaired or replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris: wall-mounted fan in dishwasher area clean utensil drawer rolling rack edge of dishwasher loading table slicer Old date labels, and paper & adhesive observed on numerous food containers. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The dumpster area has an accumulation of wood pallets and leaf litter. The dumpster area must be maintained clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
The edge tiles in the kitchen are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
Lights beneath the hood, and in the walk in freezer were nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/30/2024
The caulking at the handsink in the kitchen is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/09/2025
